title: Import an Entity-Relationship Diagram in Atlas

sections.heading: Before You Import an Entity-Relationship Diagram
sections.body:
To import your entity-relationship diagram, follow the procedures to
[export](atlas-ui-data-modeling-export) as a
`.mdm` file. Atlas can import an entity-relationship diagram only from
`.mdm` files and cannot import diagrams from PNG or JSON files.

sections.heading: Step 1: Open the  tab.
sections.body: In the left sidebar, click Diagram **Data Modeling**.

sections.heading: Step 3: Select your import file.
sections.body:
After you select the `.mdm` file you want to import, Atlas
displays the entity-relationship diagram in the **Data Modeling**
tab.
